svg.title: BI Copilot — technical architecture
svg.desc: A layered architecture: React frontend talks to FastAPI, which invokes a LangGraph workflow orchestrating four GPT-4o agents. Agents call tools (schema inspector, BigQuery tool, SQL validator) that query BigQuery. Observability via Langfuse runs alongside.

g.text: FastAPI · Pydantic v2 · Uvicorn · structured logs
LangGraph state machine · typed graph state
Standard SQL · partitioned + clustered · dry-run cost cap
